title: emilia
description: Emilia from Re:Zero texture pack for minecraft 1.8.9
body: This resource pack was given to me by a friend awhile back. I am posting it here to let other people have this goated texture pack. Emilia is a character from Re:zero and is bad asl lowk. Thank you lord for this glorious texture pack. This texture packs main feature is the skybox and inventory hud.
